title: agent-defibrillator
description: Watchdog that monitors your AI agent gateway and restarts it when it crashes.
description_zh: 看門狗監視您的 AI 代理網關並在崩潰時重新啟動它。
original_description: Watchdog that monitors your AI agent gateway and restarts it when it crashes.

title: android-transfer-skill
description: Securely transfers files from macOS to Android with checksum verification and path validation.
description_zh: 透過校驗和驗證和路徑驗證，安全地將檔案從 macOS 傳輸到 Android。
original_description: Securely transfers files from macOS to Android with checksum verification and path validation.

title: app-store-optimization
description: App Store Optimization toolkit.
